description.en: Rohi's story, education, CV, and experience.

text.en: I work with concept art, storyboard development, visual research, and archive-oriented image systems. My practice begins with drawing and reference, then expands into sequences that hold stories, roles, and visual direction.
This page gathers a concise introduction, education, CV, and selected experience so the portfolio can be read as both a personal story and a professional archive.

body.en: Foundation in visual art, drawing, composition, and image-making.
Advanced study in concept development, visual research, and project framing.
Research-oriented practice connecting archives, storytelling, and visual culture.
Studio-based training in illustration, storyboard, and portfolio development.
A complementary track for organizing visual material, research notes, and archive systems.
Developing visual archives, portfolio systems, and image-based narrative projects for personal and commissioned contexts.
Archive design, web prototyping, visual curation, editorial systems, image sequencing, and presentation design.
